mapper.insert:
/* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.insertIpUploadSub */ INSERT INTO mst.tb_upload_ip_sub ( mst_seq, pip_prefix, ssvc_line_type_cd, nlvl_mst_seq, sip_create_type_cd, sip_block, nbitmask, sfirst_addr, slast_addr, nfirst_addr, nlast_addr, dcreate_dt, screate_id, dmodify_dt, smodify_id, sassign_type_cd ) VALUES ( #{mst_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pipprefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}, #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nlvl_mst_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sipCreateTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sIpBlock, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nbitmask, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sfirst_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slast_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nfirst_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nlast_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{screate_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{smodify_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sassignTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} );
SELECT LASTVAL()
mapper.select: /* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.selectCompareList */ SELECT t.ssvc_line_type_cd , t.nlvl_mst_seq , t.up_pip_prefix, t.sassign_type_cd, CASE WHEN t.div_pip_perfix IS NULL THEN t.merge_pip_perfix ELSE t.div_pip_perfix END AS "ipms_pip_perfix", CASE WHEN t.div_nip_assign_mst_seq IS NULL THEN t.merge_nip_assign_mst_seq ELSE t.div_nip_assign_mst_seq END AS "nip_assign_mst_seq", CASE WHEN t.div_sassign_level_cd IS NULL THEN t.merge_sassign_level_cd ELSE t.div_sassign_level_cd END AS "sassign_level_cd", t.up_nfirst_addr, t.up_nlast_addr, t.ipms_nfirst_addr, t.ipms_nlast_addr, t.nip_alloc_mst_seq, t.div_target, t.merge_target, t.cancel_target, t.alloc_target, t.sblank_yn, t.group_seq, F.ssvc_line_type_cd , F.ssvc_group_cd , F.ssvc_obj_cd FROM ( SELECT B.ssvc_line_type_cd, B.nlvl_mst_seq, B.pip_prefix AS up_pip_prefix, B.sassign_type_cd, C.pip_prefix AS div_pip_perfix, D.pip_prefix AS merge_pip_perfix, C.nip_assign_mst_seq AS div_nip_assign_mst_seq, D.nip_assign_mst_seq AS merge_nip_assign_mst_seq, C.sassign_level_cd AS div_sassign_level_cd, D.sassign_level_cd AS merge_sassign_level_cd, E.nip_alloc_mst_seq , B.nfirst_addr AS up_nfirst_addr, B.nlast_addr AS up_nlast_addr, D.nfirst_addr AS ipms_nfirst_addr, D.nlast_addr AS ipms_nlast_addr, B.sblank_yn, CASE WHEN C.pip_prefix IS NULL AND D.pip_prefix IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "div_target", CASE WHEN D.pip_prefix IS NULL AND C.pip_prefix IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "merge_target", CASE WHEN C.sassign_level_cd IN ('IA0006','IA0005') OR D.sassign_level_cd IN ('IA0006','IA0005') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "cancel_target", CASE WHEN C.sassign_level_cd IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS "alloc_target", CASE WHEN C.nip_assign_mst_seq IS NULL THEN D.nip_assign_mst_seq ELSE B.seq END AS "group_seq" FROM mst.tb_upload_ip A INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM mst.tb_upload_ip_sub WHERE mst_seq = #{seq} ORDER BY pip_prefix ) B ON B.mst_seq = A.seq LEFT OUTER JOIN mst.tb_ip_assign_mst C -- 분할대상 ON C.ssvc_line_type_cd = B.ssvc_line_type_cd AND C.nlvl_mst_seq = B.nlvl_mst_seq AND C.nfirst_addr >= B.nfirst_addr AND C.nlast_addr <= B.nlast_addr LEFT OUTER JOIN mst.tb_ip_assign_mst D ON D.ssvc_line_type_cd = B.ssvc_line_type_cd AND D.nlvl_mst_seq = B.nlvl_mst_seq AND B.nfirst_addr >= D.nfirst_addr AND B.nlast_addr <= D.nlast_addr LEFT JOIN mst.tb_ip_alloc_mst E ON (C.nip_assign_mst_seq = E.nip_assign_mst_seq OR D.nip_assign_mst_seq = E.nip_assign_mst_seq) AND (C.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0005' OR C.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0006' OR D.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0005' OR D.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0006') WHERE A.seq = #{seq} ) t INNER JOIN mst.tb_lvl_mst F ON F.nlvl_mst_seq = t.nlvl_mst_seq;
mapper.insert: /* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.insertIpUploadSubBlank */ INSERT INTO mst.tb_upload_ip_sub ( mst_seq, pip_prefix, ssvc_line_type_cd, nlvl_mst_seq, sip_create_type_cd, sip_block, nbitmask, sfirst_addr, slast_addr, nfirst_addr, nlast_addr, dcreate_dt, screate_id, dmodify_dt, smodify_id, sassign_type_cd, sblank_yn ) VALUES ( #{mst_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pipprefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler}, #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nlvl_mst_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sipCreateTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sIpBlock, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nbitmask, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sfirst_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{slast_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nfirst_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nlast_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{screate_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate, #{smodify_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ( SELECT sassign_type_cd FROM mst.tb_ip_assign_mst WHERE ( (nfirst_addr <= #{nfirst_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND #{nlast_addr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} <= nlast_addr) AND ssvc_line_type_cd = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND nlvl_mst_seq = #{nlvl_mst_seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ), 'Y' );
mapper.update: /* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.updateIpUploadMst */ UPDATE mst.tb_upload_ip SET sssucess_yn = 'Y' WHERE seq = #{seq};
mapper.select: /* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.selectAllocTargetList */ SELECT AA.up_pip_prefix FROM ( SELECT t.ssvc_line_type_cd , t.nlvl_mst_seq , t.up_pip_prefix, t.sassign_type_cd, CASE WHEN t.div_pip_perfix IS NULL THEN t.merge_pip_perfix ELSE t.div_pip_perfix END AS "ipms_pip_perfix", CASE WHEN t.div_nip_assign_mst_seq IS NULL THEN t.merge_nip_assign_mst_seq ELSE t.div_nip_assign_mst_seq END AS "nip_assign_mst_seq", CASE WHEN t.div_sassign_level_cd IS NULL THEN t.merge_sassign_level_cd ELSE t.div_sassign_level_cd END AS "sassign_level_cd", t.up_nfirst_addr, t.up_nlast_addr, t.ipms_nfirst_addr, t.ipms_nlast_addr, t.nip_alloc_mst_seq, t.div_target, t.merge_target, t.cancel_target, t.alloc_target, t.sblank_yn, t.group_seq, F.ssvc_line_type_cd , F.ssvc_group_cd , F.ssvc_obj_cd FROM ( SELECT B.ssvc_line_type_cd, B.nlvl_mst_seq, B.pip_prefix AS up_pip_prefix, B.sassign_type_cd, C.pip_prefix AS div_pip_perfix, D.pip_prefix AS merge_pip_perfix, C.nip_assign_mst_seq AS div_nip_assign_mst_seq, D.nip_assign_mst_seq AS merge_nip_assign_mst_seq, C.sassign_level_cd AS div_sassign_level_cd, D.sassign_level_cd AS merge_sassign_level_cd, E.nip_alloc_mst_seq , B.nfirst_addr AS up_nfirst_addr, B.nlast_addr AS up_nlast_addr, D.nfirst_addr AS ipms_nfirst_addr, D.nlast_addr AS ipms_nlast_addr, CASE WHEN C.pip_prefix IS NULL AND D.pip_prefix IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "div_target", CASE WHEN D.pip_prefix IS NULL AND C.pip_prefix IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "merge_target", CASE WHEN C.sassign_level_cd IN ('IA0006','IA0005') OR D.sassign_level_cd IN ('IA0006','IA0005') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "cancel_target", CASE WHEN C.sassign_level_cd IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS "alloc_target", B.sblank_yn, CASE WHEN C.nip_assign_mst_seq IS NULL THEN D.nip_assign_mst_seq ELSE B.seq END AS "group_seq" FROM mst.tb_upload_ip A INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM mst.tb_upload_ip_sub WHERE mst_seq = #{seq} ORDER BY pip_prefix ) B ON B.mst_seq = A.seq LEFT OUTER JOIN mst.tb_ip_assign_mst C -- 분할대상 ON C.ssvc_line_type_cd = B.ssvc_line_type_cd AND C.nlvl_mst_seq = B.nlvl_mst_seq AND C.nfirst_addr >= B.nfirst_addr AND C.nlast_addr <= B.nlast_addr LEFT OUTER JOIN mst.tb_ip_assign_mst D ON D.ssvc_line_type_cd = B.ssvc_line_type_cd AND D.nlvl_mst_seq = B.nlvl_mst_seq AND B.nfirst_addr >= D.nfirst_addr AND B.nlast_addr <= D.nlast_addr LEFT JOIN mst.tb_ip_alloc_mst E ON (C.nip_assign_mst_seq = E.nip_assign_mst_seq OR D.nip_assign_mst_seq = E.nip_assign_mst_seq) AND (C.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0005' OR C.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0006' OR D.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0005' OR D.sassign_level_cd = 'IA0006') WHERE A.seq = #{seq} ) t INNER JOIN mst.tb_lvl_mst F ON F.nlvl_mst_seq = t.nlvl_mst_seq ) AA WHERE AA.alloc_target = 'Y' AND AA.sblank_yn = 'N' GROUP BY AA.up_pip_prefix;

/* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.selectUploadDetail */ SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, seq, mst_seq, pip_prefix, ssuccess_yn FROM mst.tb_upload_ip_sub WHERE mst_seq = #{seq} AND sblank_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: /* com.kt.ipms.legacy.ipmgmt.ipuploadmgmt.dao.TbIpUploadDao.updateIpUploadSub */ UPDATE mst.tb_upload_ip_sub SET ssuccess_yn = 'Y' WHERE seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , '' AS SICISOFFICESCODE , '' AS SSUBSCMSTIP , '' AS SMODELNAME , SPLIT_PART(F.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(F.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(F.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(F.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2 AS SGATEWAYIP , '' AS SSUBSCNESCODE , '' AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , '' AS SLLNUM , '' AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , '' AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , '' AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , '' AS SCONNALIAS , '' AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST F ON F.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD =#{ssvcGroupCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = #{ssvcObjCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , F.PIP_PREFIX , F.SLAST_ADDR , F.SLAST_ADDR

SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') AS SICISOFFICESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') AS SSUBSCMSTIP , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) AS SGATEWAYIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') AS SSUBSCNESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') AS SLLNUM , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST_BAK_20230217 A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_BAK_20230217 B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST_BAK_20230217 F ON F.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD =#{ssvcGroupCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = #{ssvcObjCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX

SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , '172.25.232.0/24' AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE --, F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') AS SICISOFFICESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') AS SSUBSCMSTIP , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) AS SGATEWAYIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') AS SSUBSCNESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') AS SLLNUM , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST_BAK_20230220 A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_BAK_20230220 B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST_BAK_20230220 F ON F.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0004' AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = '369807' AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = 'Z00002' AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0006', 'IA0005') GROUP BY A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX

SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , A.PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , A.SICISOFFICESCODE , A.SSUBSCMSTIP , A.SMODELNAME , A.SGATEWAYIP , A.SSUBSCNESCODE , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS , A.SLLNUM , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , A.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SCOMMENT FROM ( SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , '172.20.0.0/23' AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE --, F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') AS SICISOFFICESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') AS SSUBSCMSTIP , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) AS SGATEWAYIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') AS SSUBSCNESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') AS SLLNUM , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST_BAK_20230220 A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_BAK_20230220 B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST_BAK_20230220 F ON F.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0004' AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = '383040' AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = 'R00437' AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0006', 'IA0005') AND A.SIP_BLOCK LIKE '172.20.0%' GROUP BY A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') UNION SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX , '172.25.4.0/24' AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE --, F.PIP_PREFIX AS PIP_PREFIX_RANGE , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') AS SICISOFFICESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') AS SSUBSCMSTIP , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) AS SGATEWAYIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') AS SSUBSCNESCODE , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') AS SLLNUM , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST_BAK_20230220 A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_BAK_20230220 B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') AS SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') AS SCOMMENT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST_BAK_20230220 A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_BAK_20230220 B ON B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST_BAK_20230220 F ON F.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0002' AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = '369819' AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = 'VV0098' AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0006', 'IA0005') AND A.SIP_BLOCK LIKE '172.16.64.%' GROUP BY A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , F.PIP_PREFIX , NVL(B.SICISOFFICESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCMSTIP,'') , NVL(B.SMODELNAME,'') , NVL(B.SGATEWAYIP, SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 1) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 2) || '.' || SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 3) || '.' || TO_NUMBER(SPLIT_PART(A.SLAST_ADDR, '.', 4)) -2) , NVL(B.SSUBSCNESCODE,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS,'') , NVL(B.SLLNUM,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP,'') , NVL(B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP,'') , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS,'') , NVL(A.SCOMMENT, '') ) A WHERE A.PIP_PREFIX_RANGE = #{pipprefixRange, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX
